en.title: Lauraycs · Deterministic Ray Tracing Simulation Engine

fields.Headline: See Into the Electromagnetic World
fields.Sub: Grounded in the first principles of physics, Lauraycs precisely reproduces the reflection, diffraction, and penetration of electromagnetic waves in real three-dimensional environments. It turns invisible electromagnetic signals into engineering objects that can be known, measured, and predicted, delivering high-fidelity channel and coverage data for next-generation R&D in communication, sensing, and positioning.

items.title: Headline

items.title: Headline-em
items.text: Deterministic Ray Tracing Simulation Engine

items.title: Sub
items.text: Grounded in the first principles of physics, Lauraycs precisely reproduces the reflection, diffraction, and penetration of electromagnetic waves in real three-dimensional environments. It turns invisible electromagnetic signals into engineering objects that can be known, measured, and predicted, delivering high-fidelity channel and coverage data for next-generation R&D in communication, sensing, and positioning.

fields.Title: Why Is Wireless Prediction Still So Hard?
fields.Description: From autonomous driving to smart factories, from the low-altitude economy to 6G, wireless connectivity has become critical infrastructure. Yet the complexity of the physical world causes traditional prediction methods that rely on statistical models to fail comprehensively in fidelity, repeatability, and coverage of extreme scenarios.

table.Title: Dynamic Complexity of Scenarios
table.Text: Moving vehicles, robots, and crowds alter signal propagation paths in real time; traditional static, statistical models cannot capture time-varying multipath and Doppler.

table.Title: Uniqueness of Environments
table.Text: Every factory, every street, and every low-altitude corridor in flight is one of a kind, and "average" statistical models cannot reflect the performance bottlenecks of a specific scenario.

table.Title: Limits of Physical Testing
table.Text: Real-world drive tests / field tests are costly, time-consuming, and non-reproducible, and have become a serious bottleneck for product R&D and network deployment.

fields.Title: Building a Digital Twin of Electromagnetic Space with Deterministic Ray Tracing
fields.Description: Rather than relying on "guesswork," we take physics as the first principle to precisely reproduce every reflection, diffraction, and penetration of electromagnetic waves in real three-dimensional environments, mapping the physical world 1:1 into digital space. Lauraycs provides end-to-end capability from 3D scene input and channel generation to engineering-ready output.

table.Title: Deterministic Prediction
table.Text: Based on precise 3D scenes and physical laws, it outputs "what you see is what you get" multipath, coverage, and time-varying results, instead of vague statistical probabilities.

table.Title: High-Fidelity Reproduction
table.Text: It precisely computes the strength, delay, AoA/AoD/ZoA/ZoD, and Doppler of every multipath component, and can further converge errors through measurement-based calibration.

table.Title: Infinitely Repeatable
table.Text: Reproduce any hazardous / extreme scenario at zero cost in the digital world, accelerating product iteration, algorithm validation, and network planning.

fields.Title: From 3D Scene to Engineering-Ready Channel, a Four-Step Closed Loop
fields.Description: Lauraycs is compatible with mainstream industry 3D data sources, antenna models, and material libraries, and its output formats interface directly with channel emulators, link simulators, and system-level simulation platforms.

table.Title: Scene and Asset Input
table.Desc: OSM / IFC / CityGML / OBJ / FBX 3D models, with support for electromagnetic material libraries and frequency-dependent parameters.

table.Title: Configure Tx / Rx / Trajectories
table.Desc: Arbitrary antenna patterns, array geometries, UE/BS/satellite/airborne links, and motion trajectories.

table.Title: RT Engine Computation
table.Desc: GPU-accelerated hybrid SBR/Image/UTD algorithms, with on-demand selection of accuracy and speed tiers.

table.Title: Engineering-Ready Output
table.Desc: CIR / PDP / RSRP / SINR coverage maps, 3GPP TR 38.901-compatible multipath clusters.

table.Spec: SBR shooting-and-bouncing rays + Image method + UTD uniform diffraction + transmission + scattering; configurable maximum reflection/diffraction/penetration orders
600 MHz – 325 GHz (including FR1 / FR2 / FR3 / sub-THz)
Arbitrary; typically supports 100 MHz / 400 MHz / 2 GHz wideband snapshots
Omnidirectional, directional, array (URA/ULA/spherical), custom patterns (CST/HFSS/MAT import)
Complex CIR, PDP, AoA/AoD/ZoA/ZoD, Doppler, cluster/sub-path grouping
RSRP / RSRQ / SINR / path loss / delay spread, 2D/3D grids
L3-class time-series simulation, supporting arbitrary programmable time-varying scenarios and joint multi-Tx/Rx trajectories
3GPP TR 38.901 / 38.873, ITU-R P.2040 series, IEEE 802.11 channel models
Windows 10/11, Ubuntu/CentOS/Debian, macOS (including Apple Silicon), Galaxy Kylin
GPU CUDA / OptiX; multi-GPU parallelism; typically 10–100× speedup over CPU
Python API, command-line batch processing, HTTP/REST, MATLAB Toolbox
Desktop / workstation / private cloud / self-controllable cluster (including ARM)

fields.L3-class dynamic simulation, industry-le: True time-series-level simulation that refreshes multipath, Doppler, and coverage moment by moment, supporting arbitrary programmable complex dynamic interactions.
fields.Frequency coverage up to 325 GHz: A single engine covers 5G FR1/FR2/FR3 and 6G sub-THz simulation needs, avoiding switching between multiple tools.
fields.Full-stack self-controllable and cross-p: The only commercial RT engine with native support for Kylin and Apple Silicon, meeting the self-controllable requirements of critical industries.
fields.Provable 3GPP consistency: Supports direct comparison against 3GPP TR 38.901 PDP/cluster statistics, facilitating mutual recognition with existing standard link simulators.
fields.Toolchain ecosystem: Existing integration cases with mainstream channel emulators, link/system simulation platforms, and digital twin engines.
fields.Calibratable and explainable: Outputs the physical origin of every multipath component (which wall/edge/penetration), supporting closed-loop optimization through comparison with measurements.

items.title: L3-class dynamic simulation, industry-leading
items.text: True time-series-level simulation that refreshes multipath, Doppler, and coverage moment by moment, supporting arbitrary programmable complex dynamic interactions.

items.title: Frequency coverage up to 325 GHz
items.text: A single engine covers 5G FR1/FR2/FR3 and 6G sub-THz simulation needs, avoiding switching between multiple tools.

items.title: Full-stack self-controllable and cross-platform
items.text: The only commercial RT engine with native support for Kylin and Apple Silicon, meeting the self-controllable requirements of critical industries.

items.title: Provable 3GPP consistency
items.text: Supports direct comparison against 3GPP TR 38.901 PDP/cluster statistics, facilitating mutual recognition with existing standard link simulators.

items.title: Toolchain ecosystem
items.text: Existing integration cases with mainstream channel emulators, link/system simulation platforms, and digital twin engines.

items.title: Calibratable and explainable
items.text: Outputs the physical origin of every multipath component (which wall/edge/penetration), supporting closed-loop optimization through comparison with measurements.

table.Title: 5G/6G Channel Modeling
table.Text: Provides high-fidelity multipath data for Massive MIMO, beamforming, RIS, and ISAC, supporting algorithm validation and performance evaluation.

table.Title: V2X / Connected Vehicles
table.Text: Reproduces complex vehicle-road scenarios in urban canyons, tunnels, and interchanges, validating in-vehicle antenna and T-Box communication links.

table.Title: Drones and Low-Altitude
table.Text: Simulates complex low-altitude channels among urban buildings, planning drone logistics/inspection routes and ensuring C2 link continuity.

table.Title: Satellite NTN
table.Text: Models the coverage and penetration of LEO/GEO signals within ground building clusters, evaluating the performance of space-ground collaborative terminals.

table.Title: Industry and Robotics
table.Text: Evaluates signal coverage across complex production lines, ensuring low-latency, high-reliability communication for AGVs/collaborative robots.

table.Title: High-Precision Positioning
table.Text: Corrects ToA/AoA positioning errors by simulating multipath effects, achieving centimeter-level positioning in complex indoor environments.

fields.Description: Lauraycs has been deployed in the R&D and testing workflows of leading automakers, satellite companies, operator research institutes, and industrial robotics enterprises. It also maintains deep integration with mainstream channel emulators and system simulation platforms.

fields.Tagline: Making invisible signals knowable, measurable, and predictable.
fields.Sub: 乾径科技 MetaRadio · Experts in Electromagnetic Space Digital Twins

fields.Eyebrow: 产品策略三层结构 · 第一层
fields.Headline: 洞见电磁世界
fields.Headline-em: 确定性射线跟踪仿真引擎
fields.Sub: Lauraycs 以物理学第一性原理，精确复现电磁波在真实三维环境中的反射、绕射与穿透。把不可见的电磁信号，变成可知、可测、可预测的工程对象，为通信、感知与定位的下一代研发提供高保真信道与覆盖数据。

items.title: Headline
items.text: 洞见电磁世界

items.title: Headline-em
items.text: 确定性射线跟踪仿真引擎

items.title: Sub
items.text: Lauraycs 以物理学第一性原理，精确复现电磁波在真实三维环境中的反射、绕射与穿透。把不可见的电磁信号，变成可知、可测、可预测的工程对象，为通信、感知与定位的下一代研发提供高保真信道与覆盖数据。

table.Label: 动态仿真能力，业界领先

fields.Title: 为何无线预测依然困难？
fields.Description: 从自动驾驶到智能工厂、从低空经济到 6G，无线连接已成为关键基础设施。但物理世界的复杂性，让依赖统计模型的传统预测方法在保真度、可重复性与极端场景覆盖上全面失效。

table.Title: 场景的动态复杂性
table.Text: 移动的车辆、机器人和人群实时改变着信号传播路径，传统静态、统计模型无法捕捉时变多径与多普勒。

table.Title: 环境的独特性
table.Text: 每个工厂、每条街道、每架飞行的低空走廊都独一无二，"平均"统计模型无法反映特定场景的性能瓶颈。

table.Title: 物理测试的局限
table.Text: 真实路测/外场测试成本高、耗时长、不可复现，已成为产品研发与网络部署的严重瓶颈。

fields.Title: 用确定性射线跟踪构建电磁空间的数字孪生
fields.Description: 不依赖"猜测"，以物理学为第一性原理，精确复现电磁波在真实三维环境中的每一次反射、绕射和穿透，将物理世界 1:1 映射到数字空间。Lauraycs 提供从 3D 场景输入、信道生成到工程化输出的端到端能力。

table.Title: 确定性预测
table.Text: 基于精确 3D 场景与物理规律，输出"所见即所得"的多径、覆盖与时变结果，而非模糊的统计概率。

table.Title: 高保真还原
table.Text: 精确计算每条多径的强度、时延、AoA/AoD/ZoA/ZoD 与多普勒，可通过实测校正进一步收敛误差。

table.Title: 无限次可重复
table.Text: 在数字世界零成本复现任意危险/极端场景，加速产品迭代、算法验证与网络规划。

fields.Title: 从 3D 场景到工程可用信道，四步闭环
fields.Description: Lauraycs 兼容业界主流 3D 数据源、天线模型与材料库，输出格式直接对接信道仿真仪、链路仿真器与系统级仿真平台。

table.Title: 场景与素材输入
table.Desc: OSM / IFC / CityGML / OBJ / FBX 3D 模型，支持电磁材料库与频变参数。

table.Title: 配置 Tx / Rx / 轨迹
table.Desc: 任意天线方向图、阵列几何、UE/BS/星载/机载链路与运动轨迹。

table.Title: RT 引擎计算
table.Desc: GPU 加速的混合 SBR/Image/UTD 算法，按需选择精度与速度档位。

table.Title: 工程化输出
table.Desc: CIR / PDP / RSRP / SINR 覆盖图、3GPP TR 38.901 兼容多径簇。

table.规格: SBR 弹跳射线 + Image 镜像法 + UTD 一致绕射 + 透射 + 散射；可配置最大反射/绕射/穿透阶数
600 MHz – 325 GHz（含 FR1 / FR2 / FR3 / sub-THz）
任意；典型支持 100 MHz / 400 MHz / 2 GHz 宽带快拍
全向、定向、阵列（URA/ULA/球面）、自定义方向图（CST/HFSS/MAT 导入）
RSRP / RSRQ / SINR / 路径损耗 / 时延扩展，2D/3D 栅格
L3 级时序仿真，支持任意可编程的时变场景与多 Tx/Rx 联合轨迹
3GPP TR 38.901 / 38.873、ITU-R P.2040 系列、IEEE 802.11 信道模型
GPU CUDA / OptiX；多卡并行；典型 10–100× CPU 提速
Python API、命令行批处理、HTTP/REST、MATLAB Toolbox
桌面 / 工作站 / 私有云 / 国产化集群（含 ARM）

fields.L3 级动态仿真，业界领先: 真正的时序级仿真，逐时刻刷新多径、多普勒与覆盖，支持任意可编程的复杂动态交互。
fields.频段覆盖到 325 GHz: 单一引擎覆盖 5G FR1/FR2/FR3 与 6G sub-THz 仿真需求，避免多工具切换。
fields.全栈国产化与跨平台: 唯一原生支持麒麟与 Apple Silicon 的商用 RT 引擎，满足关键行业自主可控诉求。
fields.3GPP 一致性可证: 支持与 3GPP TR 38.901 PDP/簇统计直接对比，便于与现有标准链路仿真器互认。
fields.工具链生态: 与主流信道仿真仪、链路/系统仿真平台、数字孪生引擎已有现成对接案例。
fields.可校正可解释: 输出每条多径的物理来源（哪条墙面/边缘/穿透），支持与实测对比闭环优化。

items.title: L3 级动态仿真，业界领先
items.text: 真正的时序级仿真，逐时刻刷新多径、多普勒与覆盖，支持任意可编程的复杂动态交互。

items.title: 频段覆盖到 325 GHz
items.text: 单一引擎覆盖 5G FR1/FR2/FR3 与 6G sub-THz 仿真需求，避免多工具切换。

items.title: 全栈国产化与跨平台
items.text: 唯一原生支持麒麟与 Apple Silicon 的商用 RT 引擎，满足关键行业自主可控诉求。

items.title: 3GPP 一致性可证
items.text: 支持与 3GPP TR 38.901 PDP/簇统计直接对比，便于与现有标准链路仿真器互认。

items.title: 工具链生态
items.text: 与主流信道仿真仪、链路/系统仿真平台、数字孪生引擎已有现成对接案例。

items.title: 可校正可解释
items.text: 输出每条多径的物理来源（哪条墙面/边缘/穿透），支持与实测对比闭环优化。

table.Title: 5G/6G 信道建模
table.Text: 为 Massive MIMO、波束赋形、RIS、ISAC 提供高保真多径数据，支撑算法验证与性能评估。

table.Title: V2X / 智能网联
table.Text: 复现城市峡谷、隧道、立交桥的复杂车路场景，验证车载天线与 T-Box 通信链路。

table.Title: 无人机与低空
table.Text: 仿真城市楼宇间复杂低空信道，规划无人机物流/巡检航线，保障 C2 链路连续性。

table.Title: 卫星 NTN
table.Text: 模拟 LEO/GEO 信号在地面建筑群中的覆盖与穿透，评估天地协同终端性能。

table.Title: 工业与机器人
table.Text: 评估复杂产线的信号覆盖，保障 AGV/协作机器人的低时延高可靠通信。

table.Title: 高精度定位
table.Text: 通过仿真多径效应校正 ToA/AoA 定位误差，实现复杂室内厘米级定位。

fields.Description: Lauraycs 已在头部车企、卫星公司、运营商研究院、工业机器人企业的研发与测试流程中部署。同时与主流信道仿真仪与系统仿真平台保持深度集成。

table.Label: 集成的信道仿真/链路仿真工具链
自主知识产权与国产化
